Passenger Volume

The table below provides information on the number of individuals screened at Transportation Security Administration (TSA) checkpoints.

Date 2025 Traveler Throughput 2024 Traveler Throughput
1/1/2025 2,009,886 1,914,409
1/2/2025 1,987,513 1,872,102
1/3/2025 2,112,478 2,031,659
1/4/2025 2,451,002 2,321,478
1/5/2025 2,388,101 2,267,943
1/6/2025 1,723,456 1,659,312
1/7/2025 1,654,321 1,590,887
1/8/2025 1,891,234 1,812,456
1/9/2025 2,134,567 2,045,678
1/10/2025 2,234,890 2,156,789
1/11/2025 2,512,345 2,398,234
1/12/2025 2,489,012 2,367,890
